# K Nn

**Summary**: A non-parametric algorithm that classifies data based on the proximity of points in a feature space.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alsaihati|Alsaihati, 2021]] used K-NN to predict loss of circulation rate and detect occurrence in Well-8.

## Key Results and Findings

- The K-NN regressor achieved an R of 0.90 and an RMSE of 0.17 for predicting the loss of circulation rate in Well-8. ([[2021-alsaihati|Alsaihati, 2021, p. 97]])
